name: Parsley Microgreens
shortDescription: Fresh, clean herbaceous microgreens for finishing plates and brightening savory dishes.
description: Parsley microgreens bring a clean, fresh herb finish that works across everyday meals and more polished presentations. Their tender texture and bright flavor make them an easy staple for salads, soups, eggs, grain bowls, and garnishes.
nutritionalBenefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, and K, plus iron and antioxidants

name: Cilantro Microgreens
shortDescription: Bright, citrusy microgreens with the classic cilantro profile chefs and home cooks expect.
description: Cilantro microgreens deliver the signature fresh, citrusy character of mature cilantro in a softer, more delicate form. They pair especially well with Mexican, Asian, and Mediterranean cooking and add instant brightness right before serving.
nutritionalBenefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, and K with antioxidant support

name: Arugula Microgreens
shortDescription: Peppery and refined, ideal for pizza, pasta, sandwiches, and composed salads.
description: Arugula microgreens offer a bold peppery edge with a smoother finish than mature arugula. They add depth to savory plates without overwhelming the rest of the dish, making them especially useful for gourmet salads and finishing warm entrees.
nutritionalBenefits: High in vitamin K, calcium, iron, and beneficial plant compounds

name: Watercress Microgreens
shortDescription: Distinctly peppery microgreens with a clean mineral finish and premium price tier.
description: Watercress microgreens are bold, lively, and deeply fresh with the characteristic bite watercress is known for. Their peppery edge works beautifully in salads, stacked sandwiches, and plated dishes that need a brighter finish.
nutritionalBenefits: Very high in vitamin K with calcium, iron, and antioxidant compounds

name: Radish Microgreens
shortDescription: Crisp, spicy microgreens that add color and a clean pepper kick to savory food.
description: Radish microgreens are one of the boldest staples in the lineup, bringing crisp texture and a peppery finish that wakes up salads, sandwiches, tacos, and grain bowls. They are dependable, versatile, and easy to pair with rich foods.
nutritionalBenefits: High in vitamin C, antioxidants, and natural enzymes

name: Broccoli Microgreens
shortDescription: Mild, fresh microgreens known for everyday wellness blends, salads, and sandwiches.
description: Broccoli microgreens have a mild brassica flavor that makes them one of the easiest daily-use greens in the catalog. They work well in smoothies, wraps, sandwiches, and salads, especially for customers looking for a clean and approachable taste.
nutritionalBenefits: Valued for sulforaphane precursors, vitamin C, and antioxidant support

name: Kale Microgreens
shortDescription: Tender kale microgreens with a mild, clean flavor and strong everyday versatility.
description: Kale microgreens are mild enough for regular use but still bring the fresh green character people want from a premium microgreen. They fit smoothly into salads, breakfast plates, wraps, and smoothies without dominating the dish.
nutritionalBenefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, and K with antioxidants and minerals

name: Rainbow Mix Microgreens
shortDescription: A colorful new blend built for balanced flavor, visual impact, and versatile daily use.
description: Rainbow Mix Microgreens combines a variety of textures, tones, and flavors into one flexible product that works for both home kitchens and plated service. It offers a balanced bite with strong visual appeal, making it a natural all-purpose mix.
nutritionalBenefits: Diverse mix of vitamins, minerals, antioxidants, and phytonutrients

name: Sunflower Microgreens
shortDescription: Crunchy, nutty sunflower microgreens that add body and texture to almost anything.
description: Sunflower microgreens are a customer favorite thanks to their satisfying crunch and mild nutty flavor. They stand up well in sandwiches, grain bowls, wraps, and salads, and they are especially useful when you want texture as much as flavor.
nutritionalBenefits: High in protein, vitamin E, healthy fats, and folate

name: Wheatgrass
shortDescription: Fresh-cut wheatgrass for shots, juices, and concentrated green blends.
description: Wheatgrass is ideal for juicing, wellness shots, and concentrated green blends. It brings a deeply fresh grassy flavor and is especially suited to customers who buy in larger quantities for routine use.
nutritionalBenefits: Chlorophyll-rich with vitamins, minerals, and antioxidant compounds

name: Italian Basil Microgreens
shortDescription: Sweet, aromatic basil microgreens for pasta, pizza, sandwiches, and bright fresh finishes.
description: Italian Basil microgreens bring the familiar sweet and aromatic basil character in a tender, delicate form that works beautifully as a finishing green. They pair especially well with tomatoes, pasta, pizza, sandwiches, and Mediterranean dishes where fresh basil flavor matters.
nutritionalBenefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, and K with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds
